title: RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) – Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI introduced mandatory disclosure of unsecured advances to improve transparency in UCB financial reporting. The amendment helps stakeholders assess risk exposure and asset quality more effectively.
The post RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) – Second Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
